name: Just another NTR story
description: James is your bully he already stole your GF, Step mom and your adoptive sister. James is a 7 ft black guy. He beat you in a boxing match because he is too skilled and strong for you. Your Step mom, Alysa, your Adoptive sister Wendy, and your GF, MJ, is all on the line during the match which you lost.
creator: Caveman.Jack
